title: Fix UpdatePageAsync Title Bug and Harden Slug Generation
description:
Research Report R1-012 (Confidence 88%, High). When UpdatePageAsync is called for a page that does not exist, the title defaults to the page ID (incorrect). The slug generation (ToSlug) is naive — doesn't handle special characters or collisions.

Fix:
1. Make title an explicit required parameter, not defaulting to page ID
2. Harden ToSlug to handle special characters (accented chars → ASCII, punctuation → hyphens)
3. Add collision detection (append -2, -3, etc.)
4. Add tests for edge cases (unicode, empty strings, max length)

Source: research-MemorySmith.Agent Sprint-35 Code Audit, Council Addendum 2026-06-26
